title: helianthemum marifolium subsp. molle
intro: Helianthemum marifolium subsp. molle, also known as rock rose, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum marifolium subsp. molle include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of rock rose include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat minor wounds and skin conditions, or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
